overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a dimly lit industrial interior with stone architecture. The player walks across a graffiti-marked floor and ascends a large stone staircase, passing a stationary NPC near wooden barrels. The environment features gothic arches, metal railings, and atmospheric artificial lighting typical of a AAA video game.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial ground floor with graffiti markings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the stone floor toward the large staircase at the far end of the hall

notable_agents.action: standing still near wooden barrels, facing the wall

entered.detail: stone floor with large white painted graffiti markings
stack of wooden barrels against the left wall
person in white shirt standing near the barrels
wide stone staircase with multiple steps leading to upper level
metal railings along the upper balcony and staircase
twin arched metal doorways at the top of the stairs
illuminated sconce lights mounted on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a dimly lit industrial interior with a graffiti-covered stone floor. A stationary NPC stands near wooden barrels on the left side. Ahead, a large stone staircase rises toward arched metal doorways, flanked by metal railings and wall-mounted lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending to upper level

events.description: begins ascending the stone staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs, approaching the arched doorways at the top

segments.scene_description: The player ascends the wide stone staircase, leaving the ground floor and graffiti behind. The arched metal doorways at the top of the stairs draw closer as the camera climbs, with the metal railings now passing by at close range on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial interior that transitions from a graffiti-marked ground floor to an elevated stone landing. It begins by gliding across a stone floor covered in graffiti, passing a stationary NPC positioned beside wooden barrels. As the camera moves forward, the perspective shifts upward toward a set of large stone stairs flanked by metal railings and wall-mounted lights. The scene then ascends the wide staircase, leaving the ground floor behind as the camera climbs closer to a series of arched metal doorways at the top.
